whatsNew:
NEW: Voter Data module (Ohio v1)
• District tab — total registered voters, party breakdown, voter status, turnout history (last 4 generals + 4 primaries), top 5 precincts.
• Voter Universe — filterable list (party, status, precinct, age, turnout score) with vote-history detail.
• Targeting Lists — door-knock, phone-bank, persuasion, and custom builds with CSV export.
• AI Consultant now queries your live district data: ask 'where should I door-knock first?' and get real precinct numbers.
• Compliance acknowledgment modal before first access; full audit trail on every query.
• Last-refresh badge + ingest-status pill so you always know how fresh the file is.

FIXES
• Research mode (FEC + Ballotpedia) selector reliability.
• Minor District dashboard polish.
promotionalText: Colossus Campaign OS gives first-time and challenger candidates an AI-powered edge — built by Colossus Strategies & Consulting. Download and get started today.
